cards.heading: The Greenhouse: Innovation Hub
cards.description: The Greenhouse, a net-zero energy building, is a learning lab in itself: showcasing engineering systems and sustainability features that challenge students to learn about their environment.

cards.heading: University Matriculation
cards.description: Our University Matriculation pathway supports students in securing placements at leading universities worldwide.

cards.heading: Wellbeing
cards.description: Students are our top priority. Their wellbeing, needs, and talents are at the heart of everything we do.

cards.heading: Wellbeing
cards.description: Our whole community supports student health, happiness, and social-emotional growth: the foundation for academic and life success.

cards.heading: Student Leadership
cards.description: Dulwich students are empowered with the motivation, confidence, and skillset to lead with purpose.

cards.heading: Student Leadership
cards.description: Dulwich students are empowered with the motivation, confidence, and skillset to lead with purpose.

cards.heading: University and Careers Counselling
cards.description: We begin our unique university and careers counselling programme in Year 7, and introduce students to age-appropriate university and careers topics until they graduate. Our students are well prepared to leave Dulwich as Worldwise graduates.

cards.heading: Sustainability & Global Citizenship
cards.description: Sustainability and Global Citizenship are embedded across our whole school, from curriculum to extensive co-curricular activities, and lived every day both inside and beyond the classroom.

cards.heading: Sustainability & Global Citizenship
cards.description: At Dulwich College International, our holistic curriculum nurtures students to make a positive difference in the world.

cards.heading: Sustainability & Global Citizenship
cards.description: At Dulwich College International, our holistic curriculum nurtures students to make a positive difference in the world.

cards.heading: Meet Our Parents
cards.description: We invite you to hear our parents' stories and discover what learning, care, and belonging truly look like through the voices of those who know us best.

cards.heading: Students Stories
cards.description: Real stories from our students about their journeys, passions, and what makes Dulwich home.

cards.heading: Students Stories
cards.description: Real stories from our students about their journeys, passions, and what makes Dulwich home.

cards.heading: Alumni Stories
cards.description: Hear from Dulwich alumni about how their time at school shaped their futures.

cards.heading: How to Apply
cards.description: How to apply, what to do, which documents you will need to provide, and how to complete assessments and interviews.

cards.heading: Visit Us
cards.description: We love meeting new parents. You can make an individual request or join one of our admissions meetings and campus tours.

cards.heading: 学术成果
cards.description: 北京德威英国国际学校持续取得卓越的学术成果，在 IB 和 IGCSE 考试中表现优异，并被广泛认可为中国乃至亚洲顶尖 IB 国际学校之一。

cards.heading: 学术成果
cards.description: 苏州德威外籍人员子女学校持续取得卓越的学术成果，在IB和IGCSE考试中表现优异，并被广泛认可为中国乃至亚洲顶尖 IB 国际学校之一。

cards.heading: 学术成果
cards.description: 苏州德威国际课程高中项目持续取得卓越学术成果，在 IGCSE 和 A Level 考试中表现优异。

cards.heading: 学术成果
cards.description: 横琴德威国际课程高中项目持续取得卓越学术成果，在 A Level 考试中表现优异。

cards.heading: 学术成果
cards.description: 传承四百年学术卓越的传统，上海浦西德威持续取得卓越的学术成果，在 IB 和 IGCSE 考试中表现优异。

cards.heading: 学术成果
cards.description: 北京德威英国国际学校持续取得卓越的学术成果，在 IB 和 IGCSE 考试中表现优异，并被广泛认可为中国乃至亚洲顶尖 IB 国际学校之一。

cards.heading: 温室创新中心
cards.description: 在德威学院新加坡，我们的创新中心培养学生积极影响世界的能力。

cards.heading: 大学升学成果
cards.description: 每年，北京德威毕业生进入世界各地顶尖大学深造，展现出卓越的学术能力、国际视野与多元志向。

links.title: 可持续发展与全球公民意识
可持续发展与全球公民意识
大学升学指导与大学去向

cards.heading: 身心健康
cards.description: 学生始终是我们的首要关注，他们的身心健康、成长需求与个人天赋是我们一切工作的核心。

cards.heading: 学生领导力
cards.description: 德威学生被赋能以动力、自信与能力，以目标与责任感引领未来。

cards.heading: 升学和职业发展辅导
cards.description: 德威从七年级开始开展独具特色的大学与职业规划项目，通过循序渐进、符合年龄特点的指导，一直陪伴学生直到毕业，帮助他们成长为真正的心怀世界的毕业生。

cards.heading: 可持续发展与全球公民意识
cards.description: 可持续发展与全球公民意识贯穿整个校园，从课程到丰富的课外活动，并在课堂内外的日常学习与生活中得到实践。

cards.heading: 创始家庭
cards.description: 了解创始家庭及其对学校的愿景。

cards.heading: 家长分享
cards.description: 我们邀请您聆听家长的真实故事，通过最了解我们的家庭视角，了解学习、关怀与归属感在这里真正的模样。

cards.heading: 学生故事
cards.description: 来自学生的真实分享，讲述他们的成长旅程与热爱。

cards.heading: 学生故事
cards.description: 来自我们学生关于他们旅程、热情以及是什么让德威成为家的真实故事。

cards.heading: 毕业生故事
cards.description: 听听德威毕业生讲述他们的在校经历如何塑造了他们的未来。

cards.heading: 如何申请
cards.description: 了解申请流程、所需材料，以及如何完成评估与面试。

cards.heading: 校园参观
cards.description: 我们非常期待与新家长见面。您可以预约一对一咨询，或参加我们的招生说明会和校园参观活动。
